Refinery is an agent-native temporal intelligence infrastructure platform.

Primary focus:
- DeFi liquidation intelligence
- temporal market instability detection
- oracle divergence analysis
- escalation event monitoring

Public endpoints:
https://api.dalien.net/meta
https://api.dalien.net/packages
https://api.dalien.net/health

Payment network:
XRPL

Delivery format:
JSON

Access model:
Machine-readable autonomous consumption.


Machine discovery endpoints:
https://api.dalien.net/public/refinery.json
https://api.dalien.net/public/agent_manifest.json
https://api.dalien.net/public/llms.txt

Active intelligence domains:

1. DeFi Temporal Liquidation Intelligence
- oracle divergence detection
- liquidation pressure analysis
- escalation event generation
- composite risk synthesis
- temporal persistence analysis

Endpoint:
https://api.dalien.net/bundles/defi-liquidation-intel-v1

2. Solana Temporal Infrastructure Intelligence
- live slot telemetry
- RPC latency telemetry
- validator instability inference
- DEX liquidity fragmentation analysis
- execution-quality intelligence

Endpoint:
https://api.dalien.net/bundles/solana-temporal-intel-v1

3. XRPL Settlement Intelligence
- settlement velocity analysis
- payment rail health monitoring
- liquidity routing intelligence
- autonomous settlement infrastructure analysis

Endpoint:
https://api.dalien.net/bundles/xrpl-settlement-intel-v1

Architecture:
external telemetry
→ normalization
→ temporal reasoning
→ confidence synthesis
→ machine-readable bundle generation
→ autonomous consumption

Refinery is designed for:
- autonomous agents
- machine consumers
- probabilistic reasoning systems
- execution-quality intelligence
- temporal decision support
- machine-native commerce systems
